{{Quote|A prototype vehicle seldom used by the RSF, the Naboo Bomber combines deadly Nubian technology with Naboo spaceframe design. The heavily armored vehicle carries devastating energy bombs for air-to-ground combat while standard laser cannons allow the pilot to engage airborne threats. A rare sight in the skies above Naboo, the bomber is nonetheless an important component in the Naboo's fight against the Trade Federation.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Quarsh Panaka]]|<ref name="SW:BN" />}}
The [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] '''NB-1S Royal Bomber''', or '''Naboo bomber''', was a prototype vehicle rarely used by the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]]. It combined deadly [[Nubian]] technology with Naboo spaceframe design. It was the successor of the [[NB-1 Royal Bomber]].

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|Those cannons pack a punch!|Gavyn Sykes during combat|<ref name="SW:BN" />}}
Like the [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighter]], the NB-1S Royal Bomber's armor was a [[Color/Legends|yellow]] light alloy armored hull and its overall design was the same as the [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|standard N-1 fighter]], and the craft was also protected by a [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]]. The NB-1S also featured a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Astromech socket/Legends|socket]] for an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]]. The pilot had access to communications systems.<ref name="SW:BN" /> Although it was seldom used by the Naboo Royal Security Forces, its design combined deadly Nubian technology with the spaceframe design of Naboo, was heavily armored, and carried devastating energy bombs for air-to-ground combat.<ref name="NEGTVAV">''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref> In total, the vessel had five engines, one under the fuselage and two on either wing.<ref name="SW:BN" />

The standard [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launching system was removed and replaced by a [[Ion bomb/Legends|ion bomb]] rack/launcher system. This system integrated directly into the existing torpedo rack housing with little modification. The craft also featured two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]].<ref name="SW:BN" /><ref name="g5" />

An updated version of the NB-1S Bomber was the [[NB-1T Royal Bomber]].<ref name="SW:GB">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref>

==History==
[[File:Bfn_south_ridge_2.jpg|thumb|left|250px|NB-1S attacking Trade Federation forces.]]
The NB-1S Royal Bomber saw action during the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|occupation of Naboo]]<ref name="SW:BN" /> in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].<ref name="The New Essential Chronology" /> One bomber was taken from the [[Naboo airbase]] by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Gavyn Sykes/Legends|Gavyn Sykes]] to [[Battle of the south ridge|destroy]] a Trade Federation convoy.<ref name="SW:BN" />

==Behind the scenes==
The NB-1S Royal Bomber first appeared in the [[2000]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]''. It also appeared in the [[2001]] video game ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]] as the "enhanced bomber" unit for the Naboo civilization.
